lateGuidance.notDueMessage: The Aristada injection is not yet due. Please consult the guidance on early dosing.

tiers.supplementation: Oral aripiprazole for 7 days OR Aristada Initio 675 mg IM once (now or within next few days)
tiers.providerNotification: Notify provider with patient preference for supplementation and to order medications
